news.title: Maersk Lifts Guidance on Strong Demand, Higher Freight Rates
news.summary: Continued strong demand in the container market, particularly in East Asia, and a recent sustained increase in spot market rates prompted the group to upgrade its outlook.

news.title: 📈 Earnings Snippet: Maersk
news.summary: Despite the disruptions caused by the Mideast war, Maersk today upgraded its guidance, citing strong demand, particularly in East Asia, and higher freight rates. The shipping giant expects volumes in the container market to grow by about 4% globally this year, at the higher end of its previous forecast.
